meaning: Able to express thoughts and ideas clearly and effectively in speech or writing.
example: She was able to articulate her argument so well that the entire class understood her point.

meaning: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing.
example: The student delivered an eloquent speech at the academic conference.

meaning: To be or give a typical example of something.
example: This essay exemplifies how to integrate evidence into a persuasive argument.

meaning: Able to express oneself easily and articulately.
example: Becoming fluent in academic writing takes consistent practice.
